section_miscategorizations.reason: This is framed as a new treatment order in the Plan, but conflicts with the Subjective statement that the patient already takes aspirin every day. Either the S statement or this P statement is miscategorized or misstated; as written, it misleadingly suggests both ongoing use and a new start. One of these should be revised so that only one section reflects the true status (current med in S or new start in P), but not both.
